notes: Added a Settings danger-zone workflow to delete Pathmark Online Google Drive files that Pathmark can safely identify, then revoke Google access.
Added safeguards so Pathmark does not delete Drive folders merely because they are named Pathmark.
Added an optional Supabase profile removal step for users who want their Pathmark access/profile metadata removed as part of online data cleanup.
Updated About & Privacy wording to explain disconnecting, deleting, and the limits of Google Drive access more clearly.
Kept local Pathmark Desktop Workspace files separate from online deletion.
